User.title: User
User.description: A user profile in the application.

photoURL.description: The URL of the user's profile photo.

fcmTokens.description: Array of FCM tokens for push notifications.

following.description: Array of UIDs this user follows.

followers.description: Array of UIDs following this user.

mutedUsers.description: Array of UIDs this user has muted.

blockedUsers.description: Array of UIDs this user has blocked.

bookmarks.description: Array of post IDs this user has bookmarked.

pinnedPostIds.description: Array of post IDs pinned to the user's profile.

mutedWords.description: List of words or hashtags to filter from the feed.

profileTheme.description: CSS or identifier for personal profile styling.

lastSeen.description: Last time the user was active.

circleMembers.description: Array of UIDs in the user's circle.

createdAt.description: The time the user was created.

Post.title: Post
Post.description: A post created by a user.

content.description: The text content of the post.

authorId.description: The UID of the user who created the post.

authorName.description: The display name of the author.

authorPhoto.description: The photo URL of the author.

createdAt.description: The time the post was created.

likesCount.description: The number of likes the post has received.

repliesCount.description: The number of replies the post has received.

repostsCount.description: The number of reposts the post has received.

replyToId.description: The ID of the post being replied to.

replyToUsername.description: The username of the author being replied to.

replyToVerified.description: Whether the author being replied to is verified.

likes.description: Array of UIDs who liked the post.

reposts.description: Array of UIDs who reposted the post.

viewCount.description: The number of times the post has been viewed.

hashtags.description: List of hashtags extracted from content.

privacy.description: The privacy level of the post ('public' or 'circle').

audience.description: Array of UIDs allowed to see the post if privacy is 'circle'.

communityId.description: The community this post belongs to.

List.title: List
List.description: A custom feed based on a list of users.

description.description: A brief description of the list.

ownerId.description: The UID of the user who owns the list.

memberIds.description: Array of UIDs in this list.

isPrivate.description: Whether the list is private to the owner.

createdAt.description: The time the list was created.

targetId.description: Post ID or User ID being reported.

Conversation.title: Conversation
Conversation.description: A direct message conversation between two users.

participants.description: Array of UIDs participating in the conversation.

lastMessage.description: The text of the most recent message.

lastMessageSenderId.description: The UID of the user who sent the last message.

unreadCount.description: Map of userId to unread message count.

typing.description: Map of userId to boolean typing status.

updatedAt.description: The time of the last update.

createdAt.description: The time the conversation was created.

text.description: The text content of the message.

senderId.description: The UID of the user who sent the message.

createdAt.description: The time the message was sent.

isDeleted.description: Whether the message has been deleted.

read.description: Whether the message has been read by the recipient.

Notification.title: Notification
Notification.description: A notification sent to a user.

recipientId.description: The UID of the user receiving the notification.

senderId.description: The UID of the user who triggered the notification.

senderName.description: The display name of the sender.

senderPhoto.description: The photo URL of the sender.

postId.description: The ID of the post related to the notification.

content.description: The content of the notification (e.g., reply text).

read.description: Whether the notification has been read.

createdAt.description: The time the notification was created.

Ad.title: Ad
Ad.description: An advertisement to be displayed in the feed.

authorName.description: The display name of the advertiser.

authorPhotoURL.description: The photo URL of the advertiser.

content.description: The text content of the ad.

imageUrl.description: The URL of the attached image.

link.description: The destination URL when the ad is clicked.

active.description: Whether the ad is currently active.

createdAt.description: The time the ad was created.

userId.description: The UID of the user requesting verification.

reason.description: The reason for the verification request.

category.description: The category of the account (e.g., Creator, Brand).

documentUrl.description: Optional URL to an identity document.

createdAt.description: The time the request was submitted.
